[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010100 2
1 10000000 1
2 00010000 1
3 01101000 3
4 00000000 a
5 01000010 2
6 00011100 3
7 11001011 5

01 10 00000000 a match 4
12 21 10000000 1 match 1
23 32 00000000 a match 4
34 43 00001000 1
45 54 10000010 2
56 65 10000100 2
67 76 10000000 1 match 1
70 07 00001000 1

13 31 00000000 a match 4
24 42 11000010 3
35 53 00010100 2 match 0

57 75 10010000 2

71 17 10000000 1 match 1
